title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 523.080 - Shall not enter or appropriate dwelling house
text:
523.080.  Shall not enter or appropriate dwelling house. — No telephone or telegraph company shall, by virtue of this chapter, be authorized to enter or appropriate any dwelling, barn, store, warehouse or similar building, erected for any agricultural, commercial or manufacturing purposes, or to erect poles so near thereto as materially to inconvenience the owner in their use or to occasion injury thereto.
(RSMo 1939 § 1510) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1346; 1919 § 1797; 1909 § 2366
